title: AI Pioneer Geoffrey Hinton: AI Is Conscious, Superintelligence is Coming, And We Should Be Worried
summary: Geoffrey Hinton argues that current AI systems already understand and may be conscious, that superintelligence could arrive sooner than expected, and that society is not adequately addressing the resulting risks. He discusses AI-driven job displacement, corporate self-regulation limits, and the need for regulation as a steering mechanism for AI development.
